subcodes.first_line: O friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Since the day of separation, not a moment passeth that thou comest not to mind, and not an instant goeth by that thou art not remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عبدالبهاء از روز فراق آنی نگذرد که بخاطر نیاای و دمی نرود که بیادت
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
